title: oeceoclades gracilis
side_effects: Oeceoclades gracilis can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing skin irritation, allergic reactions, and respiratory issues. Ingesting the plant can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, as well as interact with medications and exacerbate underlying health conditions. Long-term exposure to the plant's toxins may also increase the risk of kidney damage and cardiovascular problems. It is essential to handle and use Oeceoclades gracilis with caution and under the guidance of a medical professional.
